_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: the tumor burden in the lungs of VS-4718-treated animals averaged 3.5-fold less than in the lungs of vehicle control-treated animals (p<0.0001)
details: 75 mg/kg orally twice daily for 2 weeks resulted in 3.5-fold less tumor burden in lungs (p<0.0001) in MM87 lung tumor model
